title: Retask
brief: Upload and activate the route as before — then the tasking changes. Flight Autonomy aborts the active route mid-leg (RoutePlanExecutionStatusMT CANCELED). Don't wait on a dead plan: take manual control and hand-fly to the new objective.
teaches: A route is not a guarantee. When FA cancels the active plan, the route stops flying itself and you must fall back to the basics — a hand-flown HSA command to the relocated objective. Recovering from a yanked plan is the first robustness exam (and DEACTIVATE can't save a running route — that fails).

objective._doc: reach-hold at the MOVED objective (-1000,-700). The uploaded RTE-1 heads for (-1400,-400); the abort-route event cancels it mid-leg, so the only way to win is to take manual control and hand-fly south to the new zone.
